headline: A Look At Dexcom (DXCM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Swings
summary: Without a specific news headline driving the move, DexCom (DXCM) sits at a recent close of US$70.69, leaving investors weighing its continuous glucose monitoring business against recent share price swings over the month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for DexCom. That recent dip sits within a mixed picture, with a 7 day share price return of 5.0% and a 90 day share price return of 7.9%, contrasting with a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 11.1%. This suggests near term...
